title: Neutradol Dustbin Odour Destroyer, Bin Freshener Deodorising Powder, Odour Eliminator for Indoor & Outdoor Bins, Citrus Fresh Multipack of 3 x 350g
features: Destroys Tough Bin Odours: Specially formulated to neutralise the household smells and general waste at their source without simply covering them up. Say goodbye to smelly bins, for good.
Fresh Citrus Scent: Infused with the clean, uplifting fragrance of lemon and orange, this powder instantly refreshes your bin space with a light, zesty scent.
Dry Powder Formula, No Mess, No Residue: Unlike wet sprays or gels, this fine powder leaves no sticky mess. Just sprinkle and shut the lid, leaving your bin clean, dry, and fresh.
Fast-Acting & Long-Lasting: Works in seconds to neutralise odours, while its residual effect keeps your bin smelling fresh for longer, perfect for regular use between deep cleans.
Perfect for Indoor & Outdoor Bins: Whether it's the kitchen bin or your outdoor wheelie bin, this effective formula is safe for use anywhere you need a burst of freshness
description: From the brand Previous page Neutradol safely destroys bad odour molecules, leaving fresh, clean air. KITCHENS BATHROOMS OFFICES LIVING AREAS The Science of Freshness Destroys odours at the molecular level. Trusted by millions for over 30 years. Gentle and effective formula Breaks down even the toughest odour molecules Innovative solutions for every odour problem Neutradol is the original and most effective odour destroyer, not just masking smells but eliminating them with a powerful, science-led formula. With over 50 active ingredients, our hygienic and non-toxic products tackle even the toughest odours in homes, offices, and beyond. Backed by ongoing innovation, Neutradol offers targeted solutions for every kind of smell. Neutradol – Not magic. Just science. Next page
